feedback: Strong package. No kill switches triggered. Both drafts are tonally distinct and native to their platforms. LinkedIn's 'For a minute I just stared at the terminal' is the best line in the package — it earns the credibility without citing credentials. Bluesky hits the webdevdad peer energy exactly. The three-incident structure in LinkedIn has a clear connecting thread (defaults nobody audited) so the multiple-findings check passes. One note: neither draft includes a specific pipeline/infrastructure reference ('my morning cron', 'my agents') — 'I build with Bun, I publish packages' is solid practitioner grounding but a more specific infrastructure detail would strengthen engagement. Not a failure condition. LinkedIn lacks source URLs (only mindpattern.ai linked), which is consistent with platform norms but worth noting for human review. Art is absent — not an auto-fail.
